signals.title: @sama: (also the internet; there should be a protocol that is equally usable by people and agents
signals.content:
(also the internet; there should be a protocol that is equally usable by people and agents)' author: id: '1605' name: Sam Altman screenName: sama profileImageUrl: https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_images/2046764873200394240/r7BxVezs_normal.jpg verified: true metrics: likes: 12389 retweets: 773 replies: 1813 quotes: 558 views: 1564003 bookmarks: 1956 createdAt: Sun Apr 26 15:46:41 +0000 2026 createdAtLocal: 2026-04-26 15:46 createdAtISO: '2026-04-26T15:46:41+00:00' media: [] urls: [] isRetweet: false retweetedBy: null lang: en score: null id: '2067774866602991933' text: "NTTが公開した「大規模言語モデル入門」の資料が有益。

自然言語処理の基礎知識やGPTモデルの仕組みについて、専門用語を極力使わずかなり噛み砕いて解説。難解なAIの仕組みをゼロからノンストレスで理解できる、未経験者や初心者にとって最高のバイブル。
\ 
こちら\U0001F449 
https://t.co/nWHEyBTa04 https://t.co/MJiOxYWzIS" author: id: '1249117291515543552' name: かずなり | 生成AI活用術 screenName: MacopeninSUTABA profileImageUrl: https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_images/1871687946988060673/xDsh_ngS_normal.jpg verified: true metrics: likes: 2 retweets: 0 replies: 0 quotes: 0 views: 174 bookmarks: 3 createdAt: Fri Jun 19 01:02:00 +0000 2026 createdAtLocal: 2026-06-19 01:02 createdAtISO: '2026-06-19T01:02:00+00:00' media: type: photo url: https://pbs.twimg.com/media/HK41iWvbkAAgkFy.png width: 739 height: 467 urls: https://speakerdeck.com/kyoun/llm-introduction-ses2023 isRetweet: false retweetedBy: null lang: ja score: null id: '1963366714684707120' text: i never took the dead internet theory that seriously but it seems like there are really a lot of LLM-run twitter accounts now author: id: '1605' name: Sam Altman screenName: sama profileImageUrl: https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_images/2046764873200394240/r7BxVezs_normal.jpg verified: true metrics: likes: 33540 retweets: 1420 replies: 3328 quotes: 1668 views: 5784938 bookmarks: 2602 createdAt: Wed Sep 03 22:21:17 +0000 2025 createdAtLocal: 2025-09-03 22:21 createdAtISO: '2025-09-03T22:21:17+00:00' media: [] urls: [] isRetweet: false retweetedBy: null lang: en score: null id: '1897348424984617215' text: 'GPT-4.5 rollout to plus users has started
signals.score_reason: Twitter/X discussion signal; agentic AI relevance; large language model relevance. Final score: 52.
signals.brief_en: A protocol is needed for the internet to be equally usable by people and agents, as emphasized by @sama. Recent discussions on large language models and their applications have highlighted the importance of accessible and user-friendly technologies.
signals.brief_ar: يُشدد @sama على ضرورة وجود بروتوكول للإنترنت يمكن استخدامه على قدم المساواة من قبل الأشخاص والوكلاء. أكدت المناقشات الأخيرة حول نماذج اللغة الكبيرة وتطبيقاتها على أهمية تقنيات يمكن الوصول إليها وسهلة الاستخدام.

signals.title: @sama: AI safety and wide distribution of benefits are the core of our mission. Two of our most i
signals.content: AI safety and wide distribution of benefits are the core of our mission. Two of our most important safety principles are prohibitions on domestic mass surveillance and human responsibility for the use of force, including for autonomous weapon systems.  The DoW agrees with these principles, reflects them in law and policy, and we put them into our agreement.
signals.score_reason: Twitter/X discussion signal; surveillance relevance. Final score: 48.
signals.brief_en: AI safety and wide distribution of benefits are core to our mission, with key principles including prohibitions on domestic mass surveillance and human responsibility for autonomous weapon systems.
signals.brief_ar: سلامة الذكاء الاصطناعي وتوزيع المنافع على نطاق واسع هي أساسية لرسالتنا، مع مبادئ رئيسية تشمل حظر المراقبة الجماعية المحلية والمسؤولية البشرية لأنظمة الأسلحة الآلية.

signals.title: infiniflow/ragflow
signals.content: RAGFlow is a leading open-source Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) engine that fuses cutting-edge RAG with Agent capabilities to create a superior context layer for LLMs
signals.score_reason: high-value open-source ecosystem signal; agentic AI relevance; retrieval/RAG relevance; large language model relevance. Final score: 45.
signals.brief_en: RAGFlow is a leading open-source Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) engine, integrating RAG with agent capabilities to enhance context for LLMs.
signals.brief_ar: RAGFlow هو محرك رائد مفتوح المصدر لتحسين التوليد بالاسترجاع (RAG)، يدمج RAG مع قدرات الوكيل لتعزيز السياق للنماذج اللغة الكبيرة.

signals.title: @sama: More importantly, we believe everyone deserves to use AI and are committed to free access,
signals.content: More importantly, we believe everyone deserves to use AI and are committed to free access, because we believe access creates agency. More Texans use ChatGPT for free than total people use Claude in the US, so we have a differently-shaped problem than they do. (If you want to pay for ChatGPT Plus or Pro, we don''t show you ads.)
signals.brief_en: We believe everyone deserves to use AI and are committed to free access, as it creates agency. Our user base for free ChatGPT surpasses Claude's total US users.
signals.brief_ar: نعتقد أن الجميع يستحقون استخدام الذكاء الاصطناعي ونلتزم بالوصول المجاني، لأنه يخلق قوة وفاعلية. عدد مستخدمي تشات جي بي تي المجاني يتجاوز عدد مستخدمي كلود في الولايات المتحدة

signals.title: @sama: Anthropic serves an expensive product to rich people. We are glad they do that and we are
signals.content: Anthropic serves an expensive product to rich people. We are glad they do that and we are doing that too, but we also feel strongly that we need to bring AI to billions of people who can’t pay for subscriptions.
signals.brief_en: Anthropic offers expensive AI products to affluent clients. We acknowledge their efforts and are working similarly, but also strive to make AI accessible to billions who cannot afford subscriptions.
signals.brief_ar: تُقدم Anthropic منتجات ذكاء اصطناعي باهظة الثمن للعملاء الأغنياء. نحن نقر بالجهد المبذول ونعمل بنفس الخطوات، ولكننا نطمح أيضًا إلى جعل الذكاء الاصطناعي متاحًا لمليارات الأشخاص الذين لا يستطيعون دفع اشتراكاتهم.

signals.title: @sama: Maybe even more importantly: Anthropic wants to control what people do with AI—they block
signals.content: Maybe even more importantly: Anthropic wants to control what people do with AI—they block companies they don''t like from using their coding product (including us), they want to write the rules themselves for what people can and can''t use AI for, and now they also want to tell other companies what their business models can be.
signals.score_reason: Twitter/X discussion signal; model capability relevance. Final score: 38.
signals.brief_en: Anthropic aims to control AI usage, blocking unwanted companies, including us, from using their product, and seeking to set rules for AI applications and business models.
signals.brief_ar: تستهدف أنثروبيك التحكم في استخدام الذكاء الاصطناعي، ومنع الشركات غير المرغوب فيها، بما في ذلك شركتنا، من استخدام منتجاتها، وتحديد القواعد لاستخدامات الذكاء الاصطناعي ونموذج العمل.

signals.title: @sama: We are committed to broad, democratic decision making in addition to access. We are also c
signals.content: We are committed to broad, democratic decision making in addition to access. We are also committed to building the most resilient ecosystem for advanced AI. We care a great deal about safe, broadly beneficial AGI, and we know the only way to get there is to work with the world to prepare.
signals.brief_en: We commit to democratic decision-making and access, while building a resilient ecosystem for advanced AI, prioritizing safe and beneficial AGI through global collaboration.
signals.brief_ar: نلتزم بالdecision-making الديمقراطي وصولاً إلى بناء نظام بيئي مرن لتقنيات الذكاء الاصطناعي المتقدمة، مع التركيز على سلامة ومانعة الذكاء الاصطناعي العام من خلال التعاون العالمي.
